class echo.objectives.DemandCharge(*, uid: UUID = None, name: str = None, rate: PositiveFloat, min_demand: float, window_array: Union[ArrayType, List], reset_period_length: int = None, window_active: str = None, num_reset_periods: int = None, reset_index: Any = None, max_demand_val: str = None)

Bases: BaseModel

A demand charge is a rate that applies to the maximum demand over one or many specified time windows.

classmethod assign_name(values)
classmethod assign_var_names(values)
create_params(model)
max_demand_val: Optional[str]

num_reset_periods: Optional[int]
rate: PositiveFloat
reset_index: Optional[Any]
reset_period_length: int
uid: UUID
window_active: Optional[str]
window_array: Union[ArrayType, List]
class echo.objectives.DemandTariffObjective(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, demand_charges: list, import_demand: bool, export_demand: bool, expansion_periods: PositiveInt = 1)

Bases: Objective

A demand tariff objective contains a set of one or more demand charges.

class echo.objectives.ExportDemandTariffObjective(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, demand_charges: list, import_demand: bool = False, export_demand: bool = True, expansion_periods: PositiveInt = 1)

class echo.objectives.ExportTariff(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, tariff_array: Union[ArrayType, list], expansion_periods: PositiveInt = 1, export_tariff: str = None, export_tariff_dict: dict = None)

Bases: Tariff

The ExportTariff objective applies a tariff, defined as an array of prices, to the negative (exporting) component of the specified port.

classmethod add_var_name(values)
apply_constraints(model)
component: Port
create_params(model)
export_tariff: Optional[str]

objective_val(optimiser, expansion_period)
class echo.objectives.ImportDemandTariffObjective(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, demand_charges: list, import_demand: bool = True, export_demand: bool = False, expansion_periods: PositiveInt = 1)

class echo.objectives.ImportTariff(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, tariff_array: Union[ArrayType, list], expansion_periods: PositiveInt = 1, import_tariff: str = None, import_tariff_dict: dict = None)

Bases: Tariff

The ImportTariff objective applies a price per kWh of energy imported at a defined port.

class echo.objectives.ObjectiveSet(*, objective_list: list)

Bases: BaseModel

Objective Set is an object containing a list of defined objectives that can be passed to the echo optimiser

initialise_objective(model)
objective_list: list
set_objective(model, optimiser)
class echo.objectives.PathTariff(*, component: Path, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, tariff_array: Union[ArrayType, list], expansion_periods: PositiveInt = 1, path_tariff: str = None, path_tariff_dict: dict = None)

Bases: Tariff

The PathTariff objective applies a cost per kW of power flow on a specified path.

class echo.objectives.PeakNegativePower(*, component: Union[Port, Path], uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, max_neg: str = None)

Bases: Objective

The PeakNegativePower objective minimises the peak negative (exported) power at the specified port.

classmethod add_var_name(values)
apply_constraints(model)
create_vars(model)
max_neg: Optional[str]
objective_expr(model)
objective_val(optimiser, expansion_period)
class echo.objectives.PeakPositivePower(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, max_pos: str = None)

Bases: Objective

The PeakPositivePower objective minimises the peak positive (imported) power at the specified port.

create_vars(model)

class echo.objectives.QuadraticPower(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None)

Bases: Objective

The QuadraticPower objective minimises flow^2 at a specified port.

apply_constraints(model)
component: Port
objective_expr(model)
objective_val(optimiser, expansion_period)
class echo.objectives.Tariff(*, component: Union[Port, Path], uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, tariff_array: Union[ArrayType, list], expansion_periods: PositiveInt = 1)

expansion_periods: Optional[PositiveInt]
static return_tariff_dict(array, expansion_periods)

class echo.objectives.ThroughputCost(*, component: Port, uid: UUID = None, obj_name: str = None, rate: PositiveFloat)

Bases: Objective

A ThroughputCost objective applies a fixed rate to total throughput (i.e. import minus export) at a port.

apply_constraints(model)
component: Port
objective_expr(model)
objective_val(optimiser, expansion_period)
rate: PositiveFloat
